calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-12-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Gender only.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
See case #541232 for Order granting Petition for Change of Name.
Petitioner: Francis Julian Montgomery, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from Female to Male.
Decree signed in open court.
